title: Exchange - Missing Exchange / Order ID response

actions.value:
Processing an exchange typically takes 10 minutes to 24 hours (average 1-4 hours). Delays up to 48 hours may occur during high traffic. For concerns, please reply with exchange information retrievable by following these steps:

  1. Go to "Assets" and select the wallet you exchanged from.
  2. Locate the transaction and tap for details.
  3. Find "Exchange Details" and tap then tap copy.
  4. Paste the copied information in your reply.
  5. Copy the transaction ID and paste it in your reply.

We will reach out to the partner and find the reason for the delay.

raw_title: Exchange - Missing Exchange / Order ID response
